communityconfiguration-automoderator-aut: Haddii habka diiwaangelin-keliya la hawlgeliyo, Automoderator ma celin doono wax ka beddel kasta, balse wuxuu [{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=automoderator}} diiwaangelin doonaa go'aannada] uu qaadan lahaa.
communityconfiguration-automoderatormult: Haddii habka diiwaangelinta-keliya la daaro, Automoderator ma celin doono wax ka beddel kasta, balse wuxuu [{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=automoderator}} diiwaangelin doonaa go'aannada] uu qaadan lahaa.
